description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four prominent wings arranged in an X-formation, each equipped with a long laser cannon at the tip. The body is primarily light gray with red accent stripes running along the sides and wings, and the cockpit is situated near the front, covered by a dark, transparent canopy. The rear features four cylindrical engine exhausts, two on each side, suggesting high maneuverability and speed. The wings are mid-mounted and extend outward with a slight upward angle, giving the craft a distinctive silhouette. The surface appears metallic and smooth, with subtle panel lines and mechanical details visible on the wings and engines. There are no visible landing gear or undercarriage components, and the design is clearly inspired by science fiction aesthetics.
description: A sleek, gray and red starfighter with four X-shaped wings, long laser cannons, and a forward cockpit under a dark canopy.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and symmetrical X-shaped wing arrangement with laser cannons.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, and the stacked engine exhausts at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the four cylindrical engine exhausts and the full span of the X-shaped wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the red stripes, wing structure, and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with four straight wings arranged in an X-formation, each wing equipped with a long laser cannon at the tip; no winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_engine_type: Four cylindrical jet engines mounted at the rear of the fuselage, two on each side.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the fuselage.
